chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibn Abi Najran

text: ه عن ابن أبي نجران فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عبد الرّحمن بن أبي نجران‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ibn Abi Najran has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Abi Najran.
